last_prompt: Implement GitHub Issues integration. Create cli/src/github_client.rs with async functions `create_issue(token, repo, title, body) -> Result<u64>` and `close_issue(token, repo, issue_number) -> Result<()>` using reqwest and the GitHub REST API (POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues, PATCH to close). Add Config fields `github_issues_enabled`, `github_repo`, `github_token`. Add CLI flags `--github-issues`, `--github-repo <owner/repo>`, `--github-token <TOKEN>`. Wire into ralph_loop.rs: call create_issue when a task moves to InProgress (store issue number in task metadata or a side-channel map), call close_issue with the appropriate state when it reaches Completed or Failed. Failures should log warnings but not abort the loop.
